about_page.meta_title: About Us | HomeoDoctorsBD - Bangladesh's Leading Homeopathy Platform
about_page.meta_description: Learn about HomeoDoctorsBD's mission to make homeopathic healthcare accessible to everyone in Bangladesh. Discover our values, team, and commitment to natural healing.
about_page.hero_description: HomeoDoctorsBD is Bangladesh's premier platform for finding and booking appointments with qualified homeopathic doctors. We're on a mission to make holistic healthcare accessible to everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To bridge the gap between patients seeking natural healing and qualified homeopathic practitioners across Bangladesh. We strive to make finding doctors simple, transparent, and accessible, empowering individuals to take control of their health journey through holistic medicine.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted healthcare platform in Bangladesh, where every citizen has easy access to verified homeopathic care. We envision a future where natural healing is a mainstream choice, supported by technology that connects patients with the right practitioners.

values_section.title: Our Core Values
values_section.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do at HomeoDoctorsBD

patient_centered.title: Patient-Centered Care
patient_centered.description: We prioritize the well-being of patients by connecting them with qualified homeopathic practitioners who treat the whole person, not just symptoms.

quality_assurance.title: Quality Assurance
quality_assurance.description: Every doctor on our platform is verified for their qualifications, experience, and commitment to ethical homeopathic practice.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We believe everyone deserves access to natural healing. Our platform makes finding homeopathic care simple and affordable.

trust_transparency.title: Trust & Transparency
trust_transparency.description: Verified credentials, clear consultation fees, and complete transparency help you make informed decisions about your healthcare.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.

app_hero.description: Select your area to find the best verified homeopathic doctors near you.

common.faq_desc: Find comprehensive answers to common questions about homeopathic treatment, our online consultation process, and healthcare services.

locations.desc: Find healthcare services in major cities across Bangladesh

featured_doctors.desc: Our team of experienced homeopathic practitioners is dedicated to providing you with natural healing and holistic treatment across Bangladesh.

how_it_works.desc: Experience seamless healthcare with our simple 4-step process designed for your convenience and well-being.

steps.step_1_desc: Find homeopathic specialists by name, specialty, or location using our smart search.
steps.step_2_desc: Review profiles, qualifications, specialties, and experience in detail.
steps.step_3_desc: Get the chamber location and contact details for consultation.
steps.step_4_desc: Receive personalized homeopathic treatment for holistic wellness.

doctors_page.description: Find and book appointments with the most experienced homeopathic doctors across Bangladesh. Natural healing through holistic treatment.
doctors_page.try_adjusting: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria

blogs_page.title: Health & Wellness Blog
blogs_page.description: Explore articles, tips, and insights about homeopathy and natural healing from our expert practitioners.
blogs_page.couldnt_find_articles: We couldn't find any blogs matching your search criteria. Try a different term or select another category.

blog_details.not_found_desc: The blog you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

doctor_profile.not_found_desc: The specialist you are looking for might be unavailable.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.description: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact_page.success_desc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact_page.form_desc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.

form.message_placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

errors.message_length: Message must be at least 10 characters

cta.title: Need Immediate Help?
cta.desc: Our support team is available during business hours.

help_page.hero_desc: Find answers to common questions about finding doctors, appointments, and using the HomeoDoctorsBD platform.
help_page.faq_desc: Quick answers to the most common questions
help_page.still_help_desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is ready to assist you directly.

items.a: HomeoDoctorsBD is Bangladesh's leading platform dedicated to connecting patients with verified homeopathic doctors across the country.

items.q: Is HomeoDoctorsBD available all over Bangladesh?
items.a: Yes! We cover all 64 districts of Bangladesh.

items.q: Is the service free for patients?
items.a: Yes, browsing and finding doctors on HomeoDoctorsBD is completely free for patients.

items.q: How do I search for a homeopathic doctor?
items.a: Visit the Doctors page and use the filters to search by district, specialty, or doctor name.
Yes. Every doctor listed on HomeoDoctorsBD goes through a verification process.

items.q: Can I see a doctor's chamber locations?
items.a: Absolutely. Each doctor's profile page shows all their chamber locations.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Currently, you can contact the doctor directly using the hotline numbers listed on their profile.

items.q: What if a doctor's phone is not reachable?
items.a: Please use the "Contact Us" form on our website and we will assist you.

items.q: How can I register as a doctor?
items.a: Doctors can register by contacting us directly at info{'@'}homeodoctorsbd.com.
Yes. Our admin team can update your chamber locations and all profile information.

privacy_page.hero_desc: At HomeoDoctorsBD, we are committed to being transparent about how we handle your personal information. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.
privacy_page.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please reach out to us.

content.subtitle: Information You Provide
content.text: When you use HomeoDoctorsBD, we may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, phone number, email address, and location.

content.subtitle: Automatically Collected Information
content.text: We automatically collect certain technical information when you visit our site, including your IP address and browser type.

content.subtitle: Doctor Profile Information
content.text: For registered doctors, we collect professional information that is displayed publicly on the platform.

content.subtitle: Platform Operation
content.text: We use your information to operate and improve HomeoDoctorsBD.

content.subtitle: Communication
content.text: We may use your contact information to send you important service updates.

content.subtitle: Analytics & Improvement
content.text: We analyze aggregated usage data to improve the platform.

content.subtitle: We Do Not Sell Your Data
content.text: HomeoDoctorsBD does not sell or trade your personal information.

content.subtitle: Public Doctor Profiles
content.text: Doctor profile information is publicly visible on the platform by design.

content.subtitle: Service Providers
content.text: We may share information with trusted service providers under strict confidentiality agreements.

content.subtitle: Legal Requirements
content.text: We may disclose information when required by law or court order.

content.subtitle: Security Measures
content.text: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS).

content.subtitle: No Absolute Guarantee
content.text: No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

content.subtitle: What Are Cookies
content.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

content.subtitle: Cookie Control
content.text: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings.

content.subtitle: Access & Correction
content.text: You have the right to access and correct your personal information.

content.subtitle: Data Deletion
content.text: You may request deletion of your personal data from our systems.

content.subtitle: Age Restriction
content.text: HomeoDoctorsBD is not directed at children under 13 years of age.

content.subtitle: Changes to This Policy
content.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices.

terms_page.hero_desc: Please read these terms carefully before using HomeoDoctorsBD. These terms govern your access to and use of our platform and services.

key_things.text: We are a directory, not a medical provider
You are responsible for your use of the platform

terms_page.agreement_desc: You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using HomeoDoctorsBD, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.title: Use of the Platform
sections.content: HomeoDoctorsBD provides an online directory to connect patients with registered homeopathic doctors in Bangladesh.

sections.title: Medical Disclaimer
sections.content: HomeoDoctorsBD is a directory — we are NOT a healthcare provider. The information on doctor profiles is for informational purposes only.

sections.title: Doctor Listings
sections.content: Doctors listed on HomeoDoctorsBD have been reviewed. However, we do not guarantee their suitability for any particular patient.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: HomeoDoctorsBD shall not be liable for any indirect or incidental damages arising from your use of the platform.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on HomeoDoctorsBD is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
sections.content: Users are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality and treating others with respect.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: The platform may contain links to third-party websites. Visiting any linked website is at your own risk.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: HomeoDoctorsBD reserves the right to suspend or terminate any user's access at any time.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may revise these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use indicates acceptance.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by the laws of Bangladesh.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at info{'@'}homeodoctorsbd.com.

footer.desc: Your trusted homeopathy platform connecting patients with the best homeopathic doctors across Bangladesh. Natural healing through holistic treatment.
